text.title: Freelancer Niche Positioning Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: 'rebuild onboarding for B2B SaaS founders +20% activation'.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Solo dev pivoting to onboarding-rebuild niche. Posts positioning across 3 surfaces. Runs all 3 validation tests over 30 days.

section.title: Output

list.item: All 3 signals passed with evidence — rules search/peer/buyer.
